sample_note: Representative sample — Twilio uses POST for both create and update (no PUT/PATCH)

summaries.DELETE /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}: Delete the application by the specified application sid
Delete a Call record from your account. Once the record is deleted, it will no longer appear in the API and Account Portal logs.
Deletes a Message resource from your account
summaries.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts.json: Retrieves a collection of Accounts belonging to the account used to make the request
summaries.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Ap: Retrieve a list of applications representing an application within the requesting account
Fetch the application specified by the provided sid
summaries.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Ba: Fetch the balance for an Account based on Account Sid. Balance changes may not be reflected immediately. Child accounts do not contain balance information
summaries.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Ca: Retrieves a collection of calls made to and from your account
Fetch the call specified by the provided Call SID
summaries.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Me: Retrieve a list of Message resources associated with a Twilio Account
summaries.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Qu: Retrieve a list of queues belonging to the account used to make the request
Fetch an instance of a queue identified by the QueueSid
summaries.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts/{Sid}.json: Fetch the account specified by the provided Account Sid
summaries.POST /2010-04-01/Accounts.json: Create a new Twilio Subaccount from the account making the request
summaries.POST /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/A: Create a new application within your account
summaries.POST /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/C: Create a new outgoing call to phones, SIP-enabled endpoints or Twilio Client connections
Initiates a call redirect or terminates a call
summaries.POST /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/M: Update a Message resource (used to redact Message `body` text and to cancel not-yet-sent messages)
summaries.POST /2010-04-01/Accounts/{Sid}.json: Modify the properties of a given Account

notes..json suffix: HEURISTIC WARNING: All Twilio paths end with .json (e.g., /Accounts.json, /Accounts/{Sid}.json). The classifier must strip file extensions (.json, .xml) before analyzing path structure, otherwise the last segment analysis breaks.
notes.GET /2010-04-01/Accounts/{AccountSid}/Ba: Audit: label=fetch confirmed. Singleton — operationId: FetchBalance, summary says 'Fetch the balance for an Account'. No collection equivalent exists. Heuristic misclassifies as list because collection-like path.
notes.POST to /{Sid}.json: Twilio uses POST for updates (no PUT/PATCH). POST to a resource with an ID is update, POST to a collection is create. This is a key heuristic challenge — method alone is insufficient, path pattern matters.
